game.title: EchoClicker
game.subtitle: Eternal Links
game.welcomeCombat: Welcome, Link Weaver! Choose a route on the map to start your adventure.

1.name: Mossling
1.desc: A small ball of moss that rolls aimlessly.

2.name: Leafrix
2.desc: A magical sprout that pulses with green light.

3.name: Sylvaguard
3.desc: A living tree whose roots sing.

4.name: Glimmerfly
4.desc: A magical firefly that lights up the paths.

5.name: Luminara
5.desc: A light fairy that dances between rays.

6.name: Leafwind
6.desc: A living leaf that flies with the wind.

7.name: Cyclorath
7.desc: A conscious whirlwind that sucks everything in.

8.name: Shroomlet
8.desc: A mushroom that releases sleep-inducing spores.

9.name: Toxishroom
9.desc: A giant mushroom whose spores are toxic.

10.name: Songbird
10.desc: A bird whose song heals wounds.

11.name: Shadelet
11.desc: A mini shadow that mimics others' movements.

12.name: Droplet
12.desc: A magical drop of water that never evaporates.

14.name: Glaceling
14.desc: A living block of ice that freezes everything it touches.

15.name: Glacius
15.desc: An ice dragon that creates blizzards.

16.name: Crystaline
16.desc: A small crystal that sings when touched.

17.name: Crystalame
17.desc: A pure crystal entity that refracts light.

19.name: Sparklet
19.desc: A conscious spark that runs on crystals.

20.name: Thunderex
20.desc: A lightning beast that strikes like thunder.

21.name: Rocklett
21.desc: An animated rock that rolls down slopes.

22.name: Mountagnor
22.desc: A living mountain whose steps shake the earth.

23.name: Wavelet
23.desc: A small conscious wave that plays in currents.

24.name: Tsunamis
24.desc: A titanic wave that devours everything.

25.name: Jellyshock
25.desc: A luminous jellyfish that electrocutes its prey.

26.name: Krakos
26.desc: An ancient kraken that rules the abyss.

27.name: Coralblade
27.desc: A living coral that creates protective reefs.

28.name: Sirenlet
28.desc: A playful siren that attracts sailors.

29.name: Arcanette
29.desc: An arcane spark that appears during rituals.

30.name: Chaoslet
30.desc: A mini chaos vortex that distorts the air.
